workdays.description: List of workdays. Each entry must represent a day of the week where lessons can occur.

visual_lesson_times.description: representing time intervals for every lesson.

items.description: Lesson timing as [start_time, end_time], formatted as HH:mm.

lessons.description: A schedule for lessons, organized by workdays. Each outer array represents a specific workday (indexed by `workdays`), containing lessons for that day. Typically not empty

items.description: Array of lessons for a specific workday. Lookup closely, these can be easy to miss. There should be many lessons each day.
An object representing details of a single lesson.

subject_name.description: Name of the subject being taught.

room.description: Room number or location of the lesson.

alternating_weeks.description: An array indicating which weeks this lesson occurs (e.g., ['A']). This usually is defined before the lesson nam (e.g, A: Maths). This has to be written in one line

timing.description: Start and end times for this lesson.

start.description: Start time of the lesson in HH:mm format.

end.description: End time of the lesson in HH:mm format.
